Lyrics.text:
Sambatra sy tretrika,
Tokantrano soa.
Tsara sady mendrika,
Fa mifanasoa.
Ravo sy miadana
Feno hasambarana.
Fa mifankatia tokoa,
Tena tombon-tsoa.

Lyrics.label: ref
Lyrics.text:
Isan'andro, ho doria
Tokantrano mifangia
Mahay mifankatia.

'Njany fa misandratra,
Hira fiderana.
Ary efa santatra
Hanambarana.
Feo milamina mirindra
Fitiavana mifindra,
No mifehy ny tokantrano
Tompo ô, tohano.

Mirana ny lanitra,
'Zay no fitahiana,
Feno fofo-manitra,
Sady fifaliana.
Tokantrano paradisa
Lavitry ny disadisa.
Fa firaisam-po no ao,
Fiainam-baovao.

Kristy ô, Fitiavana,
Sy Mpanjakako,
Sady Fihavanana,
Fiadanako.
O! arovy ka tahio
Ny tokantrano ampio,
Santatry ny Edena etỳ
Ary hatrary.
